text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe puts in an excellent performance
at the Japan Cup. Although she ran while
grappling with misgivings about whether her
friend is actually an evil witch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy sees no signs of Manhattan Cafe's
running being cursed. On the contrary, she says
that Manhattan Cafe was "incandescent."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the moments after the race, Manhattan Cafe
glimpses that blinding light once again—shining
this time where her friend's painstaking guidance
has brought her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon announces that, with her hiatus
officially over, she'll be returning to racing and
intends to compete in the Arima Kinen.
Yesterday's friend has become today's foe.
